topics.title: How China is gaining from Iran war by showing it is different from US
topics.summary: Beijing has leveraged its strong economic relationship with the US, Israel, Iran and the Gulf to keep its stakes safe.
topics.reel_text:
Na świecie znowu rośnie napięcie.
Ale najważniejsze pytanie brzmi jedno:
czy za chwilę zapłacisz za to wyższą ceną życia?

Bo największe kryzysy zaczynają się daleko,
a kończą w Twoim portfelu.
topics.post_text:
How China is gaining from Iran war by showing it is different from US

Beijing has leveraged its strong economic relationship with the US, Israel, Iran and the Gulf to keep its stakes safe.

Tu nie chodzi już tylko o politykę. Jeśli napięcie wokół tego tematu wzrośnie, rynek może przerzucić koszt na paliwo, transport i ceny. I właśnie dlatego to jest temat dla zwykłego człowieka, a nie tylko dla ekspertów.

Myślisz, że to realne zagrożenie dla cen… czy tylko straszenie rynków?
topics.follow_hook: Obserwuj Fabian Talks — bo tu zobaczysz konsekwencje, zanim poczujesz je na rachunku.

topics.title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
topics.summary: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time.
topics.reel_text:

topics.post_text:
Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy

The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time.

topics.title: Iran sees mass redundancies from war with US and Israel
topics.summary: The impact is being felt by manufacturers, retailers and the digital sector, amid warnings it could get worse if the war resumes.

Iran sees mass redundancies from war with US and Israel
